items.business: 面向LLM推理服务商提供KV优化插件/授权，按GPU成本分成；或自建Agent推理托管。赛道获资本认可（Tensormesh $24.5M，Inferact $150M）。

items.tech_en: Cross-turn intent-aware KV cache pruning system based on SGLang/vLLM: maintains QueryMemory to track session intent, combines memory-attention rules and residual cross-attention for dynamic pruning, with slot-map redirection compatible with prefix cache.
items.business_en: Provides KV optimization plugins/licenses for LLM inference service providers, monetized via GPU cost sharing, or self-built Agent inference hosting. The sector has gained capital recognition (Tensormesh $24.5M, Inferact $150M).
items.team_en: Junjie Li, Jiong Lou (corresponding author, Assistant Professor at Shanghai Jiao Tong University), Jie Li — all affiliated with Shanghai Jiao Tong University; Jiong Lou's research focuses on edge computing and LLM inference systems.
items.operations_en: arXiv cs.LG cs.AI, complete system implementation based on SGLang/vLLM, code to be open-sourced soon (MIT)

items.name: ImageWAM: Do World Action Models Really Need Video Generation, or Just Image Editing?
